cards.title: ClickUp Replaces Hundreds of Employees with AI Agents
cards.body: The nine-year-old startup is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents. This signals a major shift in how companies are restructuring their workforce around AI capabilities.

cards.title: Pope's AI Encyclical Addresses Power Concentration Issues
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose concentrated power and eroding democracy. The document focuses on how a tech elite shapes the world to its advantage.

cards.title: Startup Battlefield 200 Applications Close May 27
cards.body: The deadline to apply for Startup Battlefield 200 is May 27. Winners gain VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100,000.

cards.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird Pricing Ends May 29
cards.body: Early Bird savings for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 in San Francisco end May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save up to $410 before prices increase.

cards.title: Industry Navigates AI Security in Real Time
cards.body: Even tech giants like Google are figuring out AI security as they go. The entire industry is in a transition period navigating unprecedented challenges.

cards.title: Amazon's Bee Wearable Balances Convenience and Privacy
cards.body: Amazon's new AI wearable offers convenience but raises privacy concerns. Like other AI wearables, it creates an odd mix of utility and unease.

cards.title: Ferrari and IBM Redefine F1 Fan Experience
cards.body: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP are using AI to create superfans. The partnership reshapes how fans engage with Formula 1 racing.

cards.title: Elon Musk Abandons Solar Power Goals for xAI
cards.body: xAI has pivoted to natural gas while SpaceX focuses on orbital data centers. This contradicts Musk's previous "solar-electric economy" promises.

cards.title: AI Resurrects Dead Pilots' Voices From Cockpit Recordings
cards.body: Researchers used AI spectrograms to reconstruct pilot voices from cockpit recordings. The NTSB temporarily blocked access to its docket system in response.

cards.title: Google Adds Disco Ball Icons to Pixel Home Screens
cards.body: Google now lets users disco ball-ify their entire Pixel home screen. The feature adds a playful visual upgrade to device customization.

cards.title: VCs and Founders Inflate AI Startup Revenue Metrics
cards.body: Some AI startups stretch traditional revenue metrics to appear more impressive. Investors are aware of these inflated 'ARR' figures in public discussions.

cards.title: SpaceX Files for $1.75 Trillion IPO with Ambition
cards.body: SpaceX's S-1 filing reveals a $28 trillion total addressable market. The company ties executive pay packages to establishing a Mars colony.

cards.title: Word 'Disregard' Breaks Google Search AI Update
cards.body: Google Search's recent AI update causes 'disregard' to break the search interface. The bug highlights emerging challenges with AI-powered search functionality.

cards.title: Google Demos Android XR AI Glasses Nearly Ready
cards.body: Google showcased prototype Android XR glasses overlaying Gemini-powered translation and navigation. The technology directly integrates AI information into users' field of view.

cards.title: Spotify and Universal Music Enable AI Song Covers
cards.body: Spotify partnered with Universal Music Group to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes. Participating artists receive a share of revenue.

cards.title: Six Search Engine Alternatives to Google Search
cards.body: Google's AI overhaul is prompting users to explore alternative search engines. The shift reflects growing dissatisfaction with AI-modified search results.

cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump postponed signing an executive order requiring pre-release government security reviews of AI models. He cited dissatisfaction with the order's language as a blocker.

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI Q&A and Briefing Features
cards.body: Spotify now lets users generate daily or weekly briefings from podcasts using AI. The feature enhances podcast consumption with customizable content summaries.

cards.title: Spotify Launches Research App Competing With NotebookLM
cards.body: Spotify is releasing a new desktop research app as a preview in 20+ markets. The app challenges Google's NotebookLM with Spotify's AI capabilities.

cards.title: ClickUp Replaces Hundreds of Employees with AI Agents
cards.body: The nine-year-old startup is undergoing mass layoffs to deploy thousands of AI agents instead. This signals a broader trend of AI automation reshaping the workforce.

cards.title: Pope's AI Encyclical Diagnoses Power Concentration
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to examine concentrated power and eroding democracy. It critiques how tech elites shape the world to their advantage.

cards.title: Everyone Navigates AI Security in Real Time
cards.body: We're in a transition period where even major tech companies like Google are figuring out AI security on the fly. There's no playbook yet.

cards.title: Amazon's Bee Wearable Brings AI Convenience and Privacy Anxiety
cards.body: Amazon's AI wearable offers practical convenience alongside significant privacy concerns. It exemplifies the tradeoff inherent in modern AI devices.

cards.title: Ferrari Uses IBM AI to Create F1 Superfans
cards.body: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP are partnering to redefine the fan experience using AI. The collaboration aims to deepen engagement through personalization.

cards.title: AI Resurrects Voices of Dead Pilots Controversially
cards.body: Researchers used AI to reconstruct pilot voices from cockpit recording spectrograms, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system. The incident highlights serious ethical and privacy concerns.

cards.title: Google Search Broken by AI Update Glitch
cards.body: After Google's AI search update, the word "disregard" now breaks the search interface entirely. The incident reveals vulnerabilities in AI-powered search systems.

cards.title: Google Demos AI Glasses with Gemini Integration
cards.body: Google showcased prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and information directly in your field of view. The technology is nearing market readiness.

cards.title: AI Startups Inflate Revenue Metrics Aggressively
cards.body: Some AI startups are stretching traditional ARR metrics when discussing progress publicly, with full investor awareness. The practice masks the true financial health of many companies.

cards.title: Spotify Partners with Universal for AI Covers
cards.body: Spotify is partnering with Universal Music Group to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes. Participating artists receive a share of revenue.

cards.title: Google Search Transformed Beyond Recognition by AI
cards.body: Google's AI overview feature is dramatically changing the search experience, prompting users to explore alternative search engines. The shift away from traditional search is accelerating.

cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump postponed signing an executive order requiring pre-release government security reviews of AI models. He cited dissatisfaction with the order's language as the reason.

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI-Powered Podcast Q&A Features
cards.body: Spotify is enabling users to generate daily or weekly podcast briefs based on custom prompts. The feature leverages AI to personalize podcast consumption.

cards.title: Spotify Challenges Google NotebookLM with New App
cards.body: Spotify is releasing a new desktop app as a research preview in over 20 markets. The app positions Spotify as a competitor in AI-driven research tools.

cards.title: Anthropic's Code with Claude Shows AI Coding Future
cards.body: Anthropic's Code with Claude developer event in London demonstrated the cutting edge of AI-assisted programming. The showcase revealed both the potential and controversy around AI coding tools.

cards.title: Google I/O Reveals AI-Driven Science Paradigm Shift
cards.body: During Google I/O, DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis declared we're "standing in the foothills of the singularity." The statement highlighted how AI is fundamentally transforming scientific research.

cards.title: Can AI Learn to Understand the World?
cards.body: AI companies are developing systems designed to overcome LLM limitations and understand the external world. World models are becoming central to the future of AI development.

cards.title: Scaling Creativity in the Age of AI
cards.body: Storytelling remains core to humanity's DNA, and technology continues reshaping both medium and distribution. AI is the latest evolution in how humans create and share stories.

cards.title: US Scrambles to Stop AI Recreation of Dead Pilots
cards.body: Researchers used AI to recreate dead pilots' voices from cockpit recordings, prompting urgent government action. The incident raised critical questions about AI ethics and regulation.

cards.title: Trump Cancels EO Signing After AI CEOs Decline
cards.body: President Trump abruptly canceled an executive order signing event after top AI firm CEOs refused to attend. The incident reflects tensions between the administration and the AI industry.
